info.title: Task Management API
info.description: API for managing tasks with printing capabilities

get.description:
Retrieve tasks.

Args:
    skip: Number of records to skip
    limit: Maximum number of records to return
    include_archived: Whether to include archived tasks in the result
    state: Optional state to filter tasks by (todo, in_progress, done, archived)
    include_created: Whether to include tasks created by the current user
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current authenticated user

parameters.name: include_created

schema.description: Include tasks created by the user
schema.title: Include Created

parameters.description: Include tasks created by the user

schema.title: Response Read Tasks Api V1 Tasks Get

get.description: Retrieve all tasks that are due within the next 24 hours.

schema.title: Response Read Due Tasks Api V1 Tasks Due  Get

get.description:
Get a random task, prioritizing tasks that are:
1. Not completed
2. Due sooner
3. Not yet started

Note: Archived tasks are excluded.

Search tasks by title or description.

Args:
    q: Search query
    include_archived: Whether to include archived tasks in the result
    db: Database session
    current_user: Current authenticated user

schema.title: Response Search Tasks Api V1 Tasks Search  Get

delete.description:
Archive a task by ID.

Args:
    task_id: ID of task to archive
    db: Database session

patch.description:
Update an existing task.

Args:
    task_id: ID of task to update
    task: Updated task data
    db: Database session

Returns:
    Updated task

Raises:
    HTTPException: If task not found

post.description: Mark a task as in progress and set the started_at timestamp.
Mark a task as completed and set the completed_at timestamp.

Print a task using the specified printer (defaults to PDF).

The optional ``tz`` query parameter accepts an IANA timezone name
(e.g. ``Europe/Vienna``).  When provided, all timestamps on the
printout are converted from UTC to the given timezone so they match
the user's local time.

Manually trigger the task maintenance job.
This will process due tasks and clean up old ones.

patch.description: Reset a task to todo state and clear its progress timestamps.

post.description:
Initialize database by creating all tables.
Requires superadmin authentication.

Run all pending Alembic migrations.
Requires admin authentication.

Uses the Alembic API programmatically so that migrations work regardless
of where the package is installed (dev checkout vs site-packages wheel).

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Admin Users Get

post.description:
Print data using the configured printer.

Args:
    request: PrintRequest object containing the data to print
    timezone: Optional IANA timezone name for timestamp conversion

Returns:
    Response from the printer (e.g., PDF file for download)

put.description: Update the current user's avatar URL.

patch.description: Update the current user's display name.

get.description: List all active users. Available to any authenticated user.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Users Get

AssignedUserDisplay.title: AssignedUserDisplay
AssignedUserDisplay.description: Minimal user info for display in task assignment lists.
